M161 — Loop-autonomy gate hardening

Three of the milestone's four issues. The gates are LLM-executed protocols, so "hardening" = tightening the documented contract + adding validated slots, fixtures, and drift guards.

#2557 — /goal freshness guard (last_run_ts)

A completed streak leaves met:true in the ledger. Without a freshness check, /goal exits on turn 1 having run zero fresh verifications. The guard honors met only for a ledger written this loop.

#2556 — quorum at CRITICAL/HIGH: ADD, not substitute

Substitution left a top-tier finding judged by only 2 voters (1 of them an untrusted-label alt model). Now the cross-model judge is ADDED at CRITICAL/HIGH → 3 total.

TierSame-modelCrossTotalMode
request-changes blocker213substitute
CRITICAL / HIGH213ADD ◄ #2556
advisory101—

#2565 — starter-label review (assess holdout)

All 7 ranges verified defensible; seal intact, no re-seal. One flag for the owner. The live-token bake-off is consent-gated (not run).

#DiffCaseBandVerdict
⚠ h4 (no-authz money endpoint) upper bound 6.0 is slightly generous — a strict assessor could argue security hits its blocker like h2. Kept as a range pending the live bake-off.

#2557 + #2556 close with this PR. #2565 advances (label review done); its live-token bake-off + #2555 stay open pending owner consent for paid grader spend. Fixtures/tests: tests/skills/structure/test-streak-gate-contract.sh, test-cross-model-refuter-contract.sh, tests/fixtures/cross-model-refuter/stub-alt-model.sh.
